source: FLEURS fr_fr test set (utterance 17467158799788389101, sentence id 1707, male speaker)
attribution: A. Conneau, M. Ma, S. Khanuja, Y. Zhang, V. Axelrod, S. Dalmia, J. Riesa, C. Rivera, A. Bapna. FLEURS: Few-shot Learning Evaluation of Universal Representations of Speech. arXiv:2205.12446, 2022.
modifications: Extracted single WAV from fleurs/data/fr_fr/audio/test.tar.gz; re-encoded as 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV. No trimming. Threshold note: wer_max loosened from 0.15 to 0.22 because Whisper inflects “parcs d'attraction” → “parcs d'attractions” (added plural ‘s’) and incurs additional minor drift on the proper-noun SANParks, accounting for ~21% WER in this 24-word utterance; the rest of the transcription is verbatim.
expected_text: Il s'agit de l'un des parcs d'attraction les plus connus en Afrique du Sud et considéré comme le fleuron des parcs Nationaux sud-africains (SANParks).
